comment: "“I found most interesting the integration of blast physics with clinical care, especially how understanding overpressure waves directly explains the injury patterns we see in the lungs, bowel, and ear.”."
"Thoroughly enjoyable - a former Royal Navy Medic, we did learn about blast injuries but this really added greater depth of understanding to injuries, initial treatment and follow up treatment."
"Truly an amazing intermediate course. With once basic foundation, one can truly appreciate this course and be better prepared to implement same in field of operation. Awesome!"
"I found the information about acute management of blast injury extremely interesting."
"I love this course, it is really insightful."
